author: @youcanthandlethetruth6976
text: I have a Fresnel Lens setup. I love using the Sun's waves to produce my heat.

author: @ThinkingandTinkering
text: they were about 1.5m and the guys who run the lofges up there had between 4-6 - there were only three lodges and I think anyone who wanted to use them was pretty much welcome to do so. But I was on hard tack then so i personally didn't use them but a lot of water was boiled in the time i was there.

author: @ThinkingandTinkering
text: Yeah, it's pretty windy up there - the other main thing they had was a lot of little wind generators - but I was most impressed by the sheer number and size of the solar cookers
